overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves along sidewalks under elevated highways, crosses a busy intersection with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards, and enters a covered transit station. Bright sunlight illuminates the futuristic urban environment with neon signage and dense commercial architecture.

events.description: passing construction barriers on the left side of walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white and purple outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large elevated highway structure with yellow fascia spanning across the street
grey concrete barrier with red and white striped sections
tall glass and steel buildings with cyberpunk architecture
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive yellow elevated highway structure. Construction barriers line the left side while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead as the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and towering commercial buildings

events.description: exiting covered area under highway into open intersection with full sky visibility
crossing the street at crosswalk while vehicles wait at intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection crosswalk, moving through crowds of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians crossing the street in same direction

entered.detail: multi-story building with glass facade and numerous digital advertisements
tall vertical digital billboard displaying purple beverage advertisement
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the elevated highway into a bright, open intersection surrounded by towering glass commercial buildings. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk among a moderate crowd of pedestrians while vehicles navigate the intersection. A prominent purple digital billboard dominates the right side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and parked vehicles

events.description: entering shaded sidewalk area alongside tall commercial buildings
turning slightly left to follow sidewalk curve toward transit entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and parked cars, moving into shadow

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: dark building front with large windows and neon signage
line of parked vehicles along the curb including a blue sports car

segments.scene_description: Walking along a shaded commercial sidewalk with dark building facades on the left and parked cars lining the right curb. The camera moves past pedestrians walking in the opposite direction and approaches a transit station entrance. The tall glass towers from the intersection recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit station entrance with stairs and vending

events.description: entering covered indoor stairway area from outdoor sidewalk
ascending concrete stairs into the transit station

agents.ego_description: entering the covered transit station and ascending the stairs, moving from bright sunlight to artificial lighting

entered.detail: curved concrete ceiling with embedded circular lights
blue and red automated vending machines
illuminated advertisement poster on the wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered transit station from the bright outdoor sidewalk. The environment shifts to artificial lighting under curved concrete arches. The camera ascends a wide concrete stairway past vending machines and digital posters, leaving the street level behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the industrial shadows of an elevated highway into a bright urban center and finally into a sheltered transit hub. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive yellow highway structure, moving past construction barriers toward a distant skyline of futuristic skyscrapers. As the camera emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a sun-drenched intersection where the view expands to include towering glass buildings and a prominent purple digital billboard. The perspective then shifts back into the shade of a commercial sidewalk lined with parked cars and dark facades before turning toward a transit station entrance. Finally, the environment transitions from bright daylight to artificial lighting as the camera ascends a wide concrete stairway under curved arches, leaving the street level behind.
